title: Wrong beahvior of sequential logic.
body:
Hi, 

I've met some weired issue when running simulation of verilatored model, in RTL, it's just simple sequential logic like:
always_ff (@posedge clk)
   a <=b
but in the simulation result of verilator model, there is no delay between a and b.
Most of the registers act well, only several registers's behavior are wrong.
Any ideas on how to debug this problem? Or what could cause this problem?

Thanks,
Alex
